title: centrosema venosum
intro: Centrosema venosum, also known as the sensitive plant or sensitive pea, is a perennial legume native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centrosema venosum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially helping to manage conditions such as diabetes and high blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Centrosema venosum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin.
